CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(BuildAppKeyman__c) ,'DX推進者', IF(DX_Suishin_9__c,'h',IF(DX_Suishin_8__c,'g',IF(DX_Suishin_7__c,'f',IF(DX_Suishin_6__c,'e',IF(DX_Suishin_5__c,'d' ,IF(DX_Suishin_4__c,'c',IF(DX_Suishin_3__c,'b',IF(DX_Suishin_2__c,'a',IF(DX_Suishin_1__c,'z','zz'))))))))) ,'決裁者_現場', IF(DX_Genba_5__c,'d',IF(DX_Genba_4__c,'c',IF(DX_Genba_3__c,'b',IF(DX_Genba_2__c,'a',IF(DX_Genba_1__c,'z','zz'))))) ,'決裁者_本社', IF(DX_Honsha_5__c,'d',IF(DX_Honsha_4__c,'c',IF(DX_Honsha_3__c,'b',IF(DX_Honsha_2__c,'a',IF(DX_Honsha_1__c,'z','zz'))))) ,'')
CustomField.label: パーセプションLV_DX
